exercises.title: Error Propagation Analyzer
exercises.description: Track how errors propagate through quantum circuits.
tasks: Model X and Z errors on qubits
Count final error weight from single initial error
hints: X on control → X on both after CNOT
Z on target → Z on both after CNOT
X on target stays, Z on control stays
Count how many qubits have errors at end

exercises.title: Fault-Tolerant Circuit Checker
exercises.description: Check if a circuit is fault-tolerant.
tasks: Inject single faults at each location
Check if any fault causes >t errors (for distance 2t+1)
Report which locations violate fault tolerance
hints: Fault locations: each gate, preparation, measurement
For each fault, propagate through rest of circuit
Count errors on data qubits at end
Distance-3 allows at most 1 error per fault

exercises.title: Logical Error Rate Calculator
exercises.description: Calculate logical error rates with fault tolerance.
tasks: Plot p_L vs p for different distances
exercises.expectedOutput: Logical error rate analyzer with plots

exercises.title: Cat State Verifier
tasks: Verify that bad cat states are caught
hints: Cat state via H then CNOTs
Verify: measure parity of adjacent pairs
If any parity odd, cat state is bad
Single error flips one parity check
